_doc: Raven Hollow PvP ladder data. Consumed by PvPSystem (scripts/systems/pvp_system.gd). The Accord Roll -- 14 military ranks (design/PVP_RANKS_TITLES.md 7.1) earned by cumulative Rank Points (RP). Arena rating is Elo (one pool, player + roster). rp_required is cumulative RP to hold the rank; rating_gate (season-high) is an extra requirement on the top ranks. Each rank grants a prefix title rank_NN and a rewards row (8.2). Ranks 1-10 never decay; 11+ shed decay_rp per fully idle week. See design doc 7.3/8.2.

ranks.name: Lamplighter
ranks.duty: Keeps one lamp lit on one road.

ranks.name: Well-Warden
ranks.duty: Checks the wells for copper. Tastes them personally.

ranks.name: Fog-Sergeant
ranks.duty: Leads a file of lamps through the interior seams.

ranks.name: Stone-Sergeant
ranks.duty: Patrols the standing stones. Has never read one. That is the qualification.

ranks.name: Vigil-Blade
ranks.duty: First rank permitted to draw on Accord business.

ranks.name: Blade-Lieutenant
ranks.duty: Commands a crossing where two banners' patrols pretend not to see each other.
ranks.reward: Vigil Cloak, Forge-Red Trim (i38); legs + chest

ranks.name: Blade-Captain
ranks.duty: Holds a border fort's roll and its tempers.

ranks.name: Veil-Champion
ranks.duty: Duels for the Vigil's honor when a banner's grievance is filed.

ranks.name: Lieutenant of the Accord
ranks.duty: Carries sealed words between capitals. Does not read those either.

ranks.name: Commander of the Accord
ranks.duty: Commands all lamps of one kingdom's roads.

ranks.name: Marshal of the Four Roads
ranks.duty: The four capital roads answer to one rider.

ranks.name: Field Marshal of the Veil
ranks.duty: Holds the fog-line itself in the Long Vigil's name.

ranks.name: High Marshal of the Long Vigil
ranks.duty: Second lamp of the continent. Signs the Roll.

ranks.name: Warden of the Pause
ranks.duty: Keeps the lamp no one may see out. There is one per season, and the rank is a weight.
